title: Investigate autogenerating completions/…
body:
… per https://github.com/spf13/cobra/blob/master/shell_completions.md .

Manually maintaining the shell script is a pain and too easy to forget about.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
assigning to myself. IIUC, paul has done something similar for podman.

Yes actually this should be very simple to enable for skopeo. AFAIK there are no custom completion logic for command arguments. So only subcommands and flags are completed. I think all you have to do is to enable the default completion command.
